mapper.select: SELECT * FROM admin_users WHERE username = #{username} AND delete_time IS NULL
SELECT * FROM admin_users WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
SELECT * FROM admin_users WHERE delete_time IS NULL ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_users WHERE delete_time IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_users (username, password, nickname, phone, email, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_users SET nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin_users SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin_users SET delete_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin_users SET last_login_ip = #{ip}, last_login_time = #{time} WHERE id = #{id}
